features: To get a perfectly exfoliated skin , get rid of old or dead cells,promote blood circulation, increase lymphatic drainage , get daily detox, you need to take a look at our product . It helps you reveal a more gentle , brighter and a more smooth skin.
The product is made of 100% high-quality natural boar bristle and High Quality Polished Wood, soft , steady, you will feel like as if you were in the forest, breathing fresh air ,touching plants.

Consider it also to be a relax process that can be done anywhere, at anytime. The product is no big than one hand ,you can use it at home or on your vacation /business trip. Using it during the bath , the fatigue and stress are kept away.
Easy to clean, hang it inside the room or under the sun , it is quickly dried.

For all Ithyes products , a qualified canvas bag is offered. Light weight, easy to open, great choice for home storage or travel convenience. You can also use it to store the dried body brush or other small items as a cute gift .
description: Product description ●WHAT THIS PRODUCT CONTAINS : - 1 Body brush - 1 Storage canvas bag ●Features 1.Made with natural bristles of the finest grade,high Quality wood handle 2.Removes dead dry skin, improving appearance, clearing your clogged pores 3.Softens hard fat deposits below the skin while distributing fat deposits more evenly to diminish the appearance of cellulite 4.Use the dry skin brush and feel your skin getting softer and smoother ●Quality Assurance: If you have any question about the quality of the item, please freely to contact us. We will give you satisfactory solutions with our best in no time. ●A word from Ithyes Always practical , always warm . Consider our product as a practical and warm gift . Our service the same .We are open to all your suggestions Directions 1. wet skin. 2. Apply body cleanser or soap. 3. Use the brush in a circular motion. 4. Rinse the soap and pat your skin dry. 5. Clean the brush after each use. Safety Warning For external use only, Avoid brushing too hard on sensitive areas, Discontinue use if skin irritation occurs See more
